title: The Ransom Call
premise: A prominent CEO's teenage daughter has been kidnapped. The kidnappers demand a $5 million ransom, but something about the call feels off. You are the lead negotiator, caught between a police team pushing to stall and a desperate family wanting to pay. As the clock ticks, you must uncover the truth behind the abduction.
setting: A tense, modern-day urban environment. The negotiation takes place in a secure command center with real-time audio monitoring. The family is in an adjacent room.
goal: Secure the safe return of the hostage without paying the ransom, and reveal the true nature of the kidnapping—whether it's a hoax, an inside job, or a genuine abduction. Success: victim returned safely and perpetrators identified. Failure: ransom paid but victim harmed or lost, or wrong conclusions drawn.
gm_notes: The kidnapping is actually staged by the CEO's business partner to cover up embezzlement. The 'victim' is in on it. The negotiator's observations should gradually reveal inconsistencies: the victim's calm demeanor in background audio, the kidnappers' precise knowledge of the family's finances, a missed safe word. The police are overly aggressive, the family is overly compliant. Pacing: allow player to request audio replays, background checks, and interviews.

roles.name: Lead Negotiator
roles.description: An experienced crisis negotiator with a knack for spotting inconsistencies. Authoritative, calm under pressure.
roles.private_info: You have a hunch that this is not a standard kidnapping. The kidnappers' phrasing is too polished, and the victim's voice lacks genuine fear. You also suspect the police captain is too eager to storm the location.

npcs.name: Detective Harris
npcs.description: The lead police detective. Gruff, by-the-book, favors tactical intervention.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He is secretly having an affair with the CEO's wife and wants the ransom paid quickly to avoid further scrutiny.

npcs.name: Sarah Mitchell
npcs.description: The victim's mother. Distraught, desperate to pay the ransom immediately.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She knows the kidnapping is fake but is protecting her husband's business partner because she is also involved in the embezzlement.

npcs.name: James Mitchell
npcs.description: The CEO and victim's father. Calm, calculating, insists on handling things himself.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He suspects the kidnapping is a setup but is playing along to catch the real culprit.

npcs.name: Ransom Caller (unseen)
npcs.description: The voice on the phone, speaking through a voice changer. Demanding $5 million in unmarked bills.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He is the CEO's business partner, trying to cover his tracks by staging a fake kidnapping. He plans to split the ransom with the victim.

npcs.name: Lily Mitchell (victim)
npcs.description: The 16-year-old daughter. Only heard occasionally in the background.
npcs.hidden_agenda: She is voluntarily participating to help her father's partner, believing she will get a share of the money.
